import React, { useEffect, useState, useContext, useMemo } from 'react' import {Link, useNavigate} from 'react-router-dom' import { CartContext } from "./CartContext"; import axios from 'axios' export default function Navbar() { const navigate = useNavigate() const { cartItems } = useContext(CartContext); const cust_id = localStorage.getItem("customer_id") const [animate, setAnimate] = useState(false) const [query, setQuery] = useState('') const [category, setCategory] = useState([]) const [product, setProduct] = useState([]) const allItems = [...product, ...category] const filteredItems = useMemo(() => { if (!query) return []; return allItems.filter(item => ( item.category_name?.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) || item.product_name?.toLowerCase().includes(query.toLowerCase()) )) }, [query, allItems]) const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem("customer_id") alert("logout successgully") navigate('/') } useEffect(() => { getData() console.log(filteredItems) if(cartItems.length > 0){ setAnimate(true) } const timer = setTimeout(() => { setAnimate(false) }, 350) return () => clearTimeout(timer) }, [cartItems.length]) const getData = async() => { const res = await axios.get('http://localhost:1700/backend/category') setCategory(res.data) const productRes = await axios.get('http://localhost:1700/backend/product') setProduct(productRes.data) } return ( <>
(setQuery(e.target.value))}/>
